rdf:Description.dc:description: VH anchoring constraint visualised across three panels: (a) anchored p_ult(z) profiles per scour level, (b) 1:1 check of integrated spring capacity vs envelope H_ult / V_ult, (c) anchor-ratio evolution vs S/D distinguishing the raw hyperbolic anchoring (≈ 1.0 by construction) from the OpenSees input after stress-release correction.
